description: A warehouse operator needs to store a new chemical and must check if it is compatible to be stored near another chemical.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two chemicals in question.
Retrieve the storage and handling information from the SDS for both chemicals.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the relevant sections in both SDSs.

nodes.task_description: Use a chemical compatibility checker tool to determine if they can be stored together.

expected_outcome.expected: The tool indicates the two chemicals are incompatible (e.g., acid and base) and should be stored in separate areas.
